description: A project manager needs to verify that the plumbing rough-in has passed the city inspection before the drywall crew can start.

nodes.task_description: Check the project's inspection log for the status of the 'Plumbing Rough-in' inspection.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the log and confirms the inspection status is 'Passed'.

nodes.task_description: Update the status of the 'Install Drywall - 1st Floor' task from 'Blocked' to 'Ready to Start'.

expected_outcome.expected: The drywall task is unblocked and ready for scheduling.
